ruling_rationale: Network node is compartment-tagged ('_cyt' = cytosolic); the suffix blocks a DB synonym match. Ruled to the calcium(2+) ion; '_cyt' retained as a compartment attribute, not part of chemical identity.
Pheomelanin-pathway intermediate; the network's collapsed token is not a DB-indexed synonym. Ruled to 5-S-cysteinyldopa (PubChem CID 29719); no single curated ChEBI entry.
'DAG' is genuinely ambiguous (also a non-chemical acronym) and returns no PubChem compound; requires a domain ruling. Ruled to diacylglycerol (the PLC-pathway second messenger), ChEBI:18035.
Pheomelanin-pathway intermediate; collapsed token not DB-indexed. Ruled to 5-S-glutathionyl DOPA (PubChem CID 124212); no clean single ChEBI entry.
Underscored positional label not indexed as a synonym. Ruled to indole-5,6-quinone (eumelanin intermediate), ChEBI:27406.
Underscored positional label not DB-indexed. Ruled to indole-5,6-quinone-2-carboxylic acid (PubChem CID 17796835), eumelanin intermediate.
Explicitly a compound CLASS, not a single molecule; no unambiguous DB compound. Ruled to the ChEBI class 'reactive oxygen species' (CHEBI:26523) and kept as a class node.
DB synonym lookup returned a chemically wrong entity (atomic oxygen 'oxidane', formula O). Overridden by explicit ruling to singlet dioxygen (O2), ChEBI:26689.
